text.title: Distribution Channel Research Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.code: { "considered": [ "seo", "sem", "content", "email", "viral", "affiliate", "pr", "social-display", "trade-shows", "speaking", "community", "sales", "business-dev", "engineering-as-marketing", "targeting-blogs", "offline-ads", "social-ads", "podcasts", "platform-marketplaces" ], "shortlist": [ "seo", "content", "community" ], "tests": [ { "channel": "seo", "budget_usd": 500, "cac": 28, "reach": 4200, "time_to_signal_days": 30, "d30_retention": 0.41 }, { "channel": "content", "budget_usd": 500, "cac": 41, "reach": 6800, "time_to_signal_days": 45, "d30_retention": 0.52 }, { "channel": "community", "budget_usd": 300, "cac": 12, "reach": 800, "time_to_signal_days": 14, "d30_retention": 0.63 } ], "verdict": { "primary": "community", "secondary": "seo" }, "tripwires": [ { "channel": "community", "rule": "CAC > $25 for 2 consecutive weeks" }, { "channel": "seo", "rule": "Reach < 2000 / month for 60 days" } ] }

example.note: Shortlist exceeds 3 channels; tests array empty; considered list missing; verdict and tripwires absent.

list.pattern: Test without explicit budget_usd and stop-loss.
Verdict picked on CAC alone, ignoring reach + time-to-signal + retention.
